query: SELECT b.id AS bookingId, b.bookingNumber, b.reservationId, b.status AS bookingStatus, ro.id AS opId, ro.op_status AS opStatus FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = b.reservationId ORDER BY b.id;
